policy_text: We collect your email address when you create a ReadAloud account, used solely for account login and password recovery. We collect anonymous crash logs and diagnostic data through Google Firebase Crashlytics. Your device advertising identifier is shared with Google Analytics for app-usage analytics only. We do not sell personal data and we do not share any data with third parties for marketing.

policy_text: PocketBeauty Mirror may share usage information with our analytics service providers, including but not limited to AppsFlyer and similar third parties, for service-improvement purposes. We may also use advertising partners. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. We use cookies and similar technologies. Your photos are processed on-device.

policy_text: QuickFlash uses Google AdMob to display interstitial advertisements. AdMob may collect the Android Advertising ID, approximate location derived from IP, device information, and ad interaction events. We also use Firebase Analytics for app-event tracking. By using QuickFlash you consent to these third-party processing activities. We retain analytics data for 24 months.
